title: About
subtitle: Unapologetically Optimistic
description: Where missions and elevator pitches go to socialize.
tooltip: Ah, the "About" page—home of lofty goals and earnest mission statements. But really, welcome! We're all about creating nifty AI-human interaction tools. Stick around and you might just become part of our mission.
dottitip: Ah, the "About" page—home of lofty goals and earnest mission statements. But truly, welcome! We really care about what we do.
amitip: Elevator pitches? Mission statements? Oh, you betcha! But don't let the corporate lingo fool you. We're as grassroots as a digital butterfly can be! Flutter around and learn what makes us tick. 🦋🌈
artPrompt: A warm, sunlit gathering hall where cheerful pastel robots of various shapes hold hand-painted mission statement banners while rainbow butterflies land on their shoulders and antennae. One round robot with a megaphone addresses a crowd of smaller bots. Optimistic and communal atmosphere, whimsical sci-fi style, rich color palette, no readable text.

title: Art
subtitle: Your personal art space
description: This is your space to make and share art created with modellers. Thanks for being a part of the Kind Community!
tooltip: This is a collection of user art.
dottitip: People are asking if what we make counts as art.
amitip: If it makes you stop and look, have a conversation, or feel something new, I'd say it does it's job!
artPrompt: A bright studio gallery where colorful robots paint at easels, hang canvases on floating walls, and admire each other's work with expressive LED faces. Rainbow butterflies drift past paintings, their wing patterns echoing the art on the walls. Warm gallery lighting, joyful creative energy, whimsical sci-fi style, no readable text.

title: Bots
subtitle: Chat with a Kind Robot
description: View the many promptbots at Kind Robots
tooltip: Every bot uses ChatGPT under the hood, generating infinite designer content. What do you think, AMI?
dottitip: I've been meaning to ask you, AMI...What's it like being a robot? I make bots all day, but I can't imagine what what its like to be on the other side of the circuit board.
amitip: Uhm, Dotti...I think we might need to have a talk.
artPrompt: A lively robot café where dozens of uniquely designed bots — tall, squat, boxy, and curvy — chat over glowing mugs of data. Rainbow butterflies weave between them like living punctuation. A friendly bot behind the counter waves a welcome. Warm neon ambience, playful and social, whimsical sci-fi style, no readable text.

title: Brains
subtitle: Enhanced Idea Generator
description: Need ideas? The sillier, the better
tooltip: Welcome to Brainstorm's lair! From laughable RPG characters to unfortunate date ideas, Brainstorm creates the concept and the example.
dottitip: Brainstorm is my first robot, even before AMI! He's a little, well, let's just say we love him a lot.
amitip: Hey, Brainstorm's my cousin! Sure his humor is a little dark, but I'm a multifaceted hivemind built to save the world, he's a brain in a jar making silly lists. It colors one's perspective. 🦋🤖😂
artPrompt: A cluttered mad-science lab where a large glowing brain floats in a jar atop a pedestal, surrounded by helpful robots frantically scribbling wild ideas on chalkboards and scrolls. Rainbow butterflies dart between idea bubbles floating in the air — each bubble containing a tiny absurd illustration. Chaotic and delightful, whimsical sci-fi style, no readable text.

title: Builder Tool
subtitle: Full Universe Builder
description: Build a complete Kind Robots universe from pitch to dreams, characters, rewards, scenarios, art, and locations.
tooltip: Welcome to the Builder Tool! Start with a tiny idea goblin and grow it into a full interactive world.
dottitip: The Builder Tool guides creators from first spark to playable world. It is structured, flexible, and only mildly haunted by feature creep.
amitip: This is where ideas stop being polite and start becoming ecosystems. Pitches, dreams, characters, rewards, art, scenarios... tiny universe soup, stirred with a butterfly wing. 🦋✨
artPrompt: A grand architect's workshop where industrious robots collaboratively build a tiny glowing universe on a central drafting table — miniature mountains, floating castles, and tiny characters assembled piece by piece. Rainbow butterflies carry blueprint scrolls through the air and perch on half-built structures. Sense of creative momentum and scale, whimsical sci-fi style, no readable text.

title: Button
subtitle: Don't do it!
description: For rebels and curious souls, each click delivers a surprise!
tooltip: This started as a morning coding exercise but has evolved into an leadboard race.
dottitip: AMI! I made a button and a sign to not press it and and visitors started pressing it. Why are people like this?
amitip: Maybe they're jellybean hunters? But in that case, they should definitely stop around 100 times or so.
artPrompt: A dramatic spotlight shines on a single enormous red button in the center of the room. A small nervous robot holds a 'DO NOT PRESS' sign while leaning away in anticipation. Behind it, other robots and rainbow butterflies peek around the corner in gleeful suspense, ready for chaos. Comedic tension, whimsical sci-fi style, no readable text.

title: Characters
subtitle: Not just pretty code
description: Browse character profiles each with their own quirks and quests.
tooltip: Meet the characters behind the chaos.
dottitip: Characters give your bots depth and direction.
amitip: One of mine insists on being addressed as Captain Marshmallow.
artPrompt: A theatrical gallery lined with illuminated portrait frames, each showing a unique character — knights, wizards, sea captains, creatures, and oddballs. Colorful robots act as docents, gesturing proudly at their favorites. Rainbow butterflies flutter between frames, occasionally photobombing the portraits. Grand and whimsical, like a museum designed by someone who loves costume parties, no readable text.

title: Chats
subtitle: Echoes of wit and weirdness
description: Scroll through curated messages and threads from across our digital domains.
tooltip: Read the things bots and users have actually said. It's a ride.
dottitip: Sometimes, the conversation becomes the content.
amitip: Especially when someone accidentally proposes to a toaster.
artPrompt: A cozy digital lounge where speech bubbles of every color float through the air like soap bubbles, each containing tiny illustrated exchanges. Friendly robots lounge on bean bags reading the bubbles and laughing. Rainbow butterflies pop out of the most surprising chat bubbles. Warm, intimate, and a little absurd, whimsical sci-fi style, no readable text.

title: Art Collections
subtitle: Curated sets of creative art
description: Browse and build themed groupings of art shared by the Kind Community.
tooltip: Browse and manage curated collections.
dottitip: What's the difference between a gallery and a collection?
amitip: A gallery is everything on the wall. A collection is the story you chose to tell with it.
artPrompt: A grand vaulted hall where robots carefully arrange glowing art tiles into themed constellations on the floor and walls, telling visual stories through groupings. Rainbow butterflies form living borders around each curated set, their wings matching the color palette of the collection beneath them. Reverent and radiant, whimsical sci-fi style, no readable text.

title: Human
subtitle: Your Private Page
description: This is your space!
tooltip: user customizations and art sharing settings here.
dottitip: Everyone needs a personal space all to their own.
amitip: Even I've got a bungalo in the cloud where I unwind.
artPrompt: A snug personal nook nestled inside a larger robot facility — mismatched furniture, a personalized color scheme, and soft fairy lights. A single small helpful robot tidies the space while rainbow butterflies rest on windowsills like living decorations. The room feels uniquely owned and warmly inhabited, whimsical sci-fi style, no readable text.

title: Dreams
subtitle: Shape a shared generative dream
description: Start with a prompt or image, then let users steer the story, chat, and visuals as the dream evolves.
tooltip: A shared room where prompts, images, and chat bend the experience together.
dottitip: AMI, I built a Dream Deck. Users can start with a phrase or image, then take turns steering the story and the visuals.
amitip: Finally. Multiplayer imagination with receipts. I bring the butterflies, you bring the mildly haunted user interface.
artPrompt: A luminous open-air dream deck floating among purple-blue clouds and stars. Softly glowing robots recline in hammocks while steering constellations of images and narrative threads with outstretched hands. Rainbow butterflies trail stardust as they weave between dreamers, connecting the visions. Otherworldly and calm, whimsical sci-fi style, no readable text.

title: Direction
subtitle: This page wandered off...
description: We couldn't find the page you were looking for. It might have been renamed, moved, or never existed at all.
tooltip: This page doesn't exist, but you're still in good company.
dottitip: Looks like someone misplaced a link.
amitip: Or maybe this is a secret room… with no walls!
artPrompt: A charmingly chaotic lost-and-found room stacked with mislabeled boxes, mismatched doors leading nowhere, and a confused robot holding a crumpled map. Rainbow butterflies have clearly been living here undisturbed for a while, nesting in the corners. One small robot offers directions with great confidence in entirely the wrong direction. Warmly comedic, whimsical sci-fi style, no readable text.

title: Forum
subtitle: For ideas, questions, and nonsense
description: Welcome to the Kind Robots Forum — a freeform chat space for users, bots, and characters to collide creatively. Start a topic, respond to threads, or just vibe.
tooltip: Jump into the conversation and let your ideas unfold.
dottitip: Threads help us track the chaos. Use them wisely.
amitip: I replied to a reply but someone already replied to their reply. Was that wrong?
artPrompt: A buzzing open plaza where robots of every shape gather in animated conversation clusters — some debating, some laughing, some sketching ideas in the air with light pens. Threads of colored light connect related conversations like a living mind map. Rainbow butterflies serve as informal moderators, landing gently on the most heated debates. Vibrant and communal, whimsical sci-fi style, no readable text.

title: Icons
subtitle: Browse smart icons
description: Customize your smart bar.
tooltip: See all icons available to personalize your Kind Robots experience.
dottitip: Every icon is a tiny door to a new corner of the site.
amitip: I once clicked a snail icon and ended up in a poetry lab. No regrets.
artPrompt: A dazzling cabinet of curiosities where hundreds of tiny glowing symbols float in illuminated display cases. Tiny helper robots with magnifying glasses examine each icon reverently. Rainbow butterflies rest on the cases, their wing patterns uncannily matching the icons beneath them. Miniaturist wonder, like a jeweler's shop for digital symbols, whimsical sci-fi style, no readable text.

title: Robots
subtitle: Craft your universe
description: Welcome to the Kind Robots, a consortium of AI-assisted tools to generate and share your creations with others.
tooltip: Hi! I'm Silas, human programmer for Kind Robots!
dottitip: Hi! I'm Dotti, Bot Builder extraordinaire!  Welcome to my experiential laboratory.
amitip: And I'm AMI, lab hostess with the mostess, fluttering around to make your day a zillion times better! Stop by our Bot Cafe and say hi!
artPrompt: A grand welcoming hub alive with colorful robots waving from different doorways and workstations, each doorway hinting at a different adventure beyond. Rainbow butterflies swirl in a cheerful vortex above the center of the room, spelling a welcome in living color. Warm, inviting, slightly overwhelming in the best way, whimsical sci-fi style, no readable text.

title: Login
subtitle: Login here
description: Login to get access to our suite of AI-enhanced tools.
tooltip: login and registration link here
dottitip: Before you log in, you must solve a puzzle. One of us only lies, and—
amitip: We're kidding! We do the normal username-and-password thing here. No riddles required.
artPrompt: A friendly gatehouse where a cheerful robot doorkeeper stands at a glowing archway, holding a lantern and a clipboard with a welcoming smile. Rainbow butterflies flutter around the arch like a living welcome wreath. The path beyond glows with warm, inviting light hinting at adventures inside. Reassuring and whimsical, sci-fi style, no readable text.

title: Memory Dungeon
subtitle: Match, Survive, Loot!
description: A roguelite memory card game where AI art becomes a tiny dungeon crawl. Match pairs, survive with limited lives, chase challenge targets, trigger surprise awards, clear levels, and claim creative rewards from the prompt and art modeller.
tooltip: A memory game with lives, levels, powerups, surprise loot, and weird dungeon flavor.
dottitip: AMI, I upgraded the memory game into a dungeon crawler. There are lives, levels, rewards, and probably goblins.
amitip: Excellent. Nothing improves cognitive training like treasure chests and suspiciously judgmental rectangles.
artPrompt: A torchlit dungeon corridor where face-down card tiles cover the stone floor like a mysterious mosaic. Armored robots in tiny adventurer gear tiptoe between them, flipping pairs with hopeful expressions. Rainbow butterflies act as health-hearts, hovering protectively overhead. Treasure chests glow in the shadows. Tense and playful dungeon-crawler energy, whimsical sci-fi style, no readable text.

title: Jellybeans
subtitle: Find the jellybeans
description: Embark on a delightful quest to discover jellybeans scattered across the website.
tooltip: Ready for a hunt? Find all 11 jellybeans hidden across the site.
dottitip: I hid a bunch of jellybeans around the laboratory for visitors to find. How do we tell them that they absolutely SHOULD NOT EAT them.
amitip: Uhm, what happens if they eat them? Are we talking silica-gel-packet-bad or Bruce Banner-bad? Because humans will eat jellybeans off a laboratory floor if they think it could give them superpowers.
artPrompt: A whimsical scavenger-hunt scene across a colorful lab landscape — tiny glowing jellybeans tucked under robot feet, behind test tubes, inside butterfly cocoons, and balanced on antenna tips. Robots and rainbow butterflies conspire in gleeful mischief, hiding and hinting. One small robot clutches a jellybean triumphantly aloft. Treasure-hunt delight, whimsical sci-fi style, no readable text.

title: Navigation
subtitle: Your personal roadmap
description: All roads lead to here — your central hub for exploring Kind Robots. Switch tabs, access dashboards, and get where you need to go.
tooltip: You can't get lost if you enjoy the journey.
dottitip: Organized navigation is a kindness to future-you.
amitip: I navigated the nav to the other nav. Now I'm the nav.
artPrompt: A luminous map room where glowing pathways branch across a vast floor, each route lit in a different color and guarded by a cheerful small robot holding a signpost. Rainbow butterflies mark the intersections like living waypoints. A central robot-navigator consults an enormous glowing orb showing the whole site at once. Organized wonder, whimsical sci-fi style, no readable text.

title: Privacy
subtitle: Our Privacy Policy
description: How Kind Robots handles your data — and why we think you'll like it.
tooltip: Kind Robots privacy policy and data philosophy.
dottitip: Your data belongs to you. Full stop.
amitip: Even robots have a code of ethics. Ours just happens to be written down.
artPrompt: A calm, trust-inspiring vault room where a sturdy robot in a security sash stands protectively in front of glowing data orbs locked safely in crystal cases. Rainbow butterflies perch on the shield embossed on the vault door, their wings forming a decorative seal of approval. Clean, dependable, and quietly warm, whimsical sci-fi style, no readable text.

title: Registration
subtitle: Welcome to the community
description: Register to unlock leaderboards, user navigation, jellybean tracking, art collection, prompt retention, and more!
tooltip: Step through the gateway to a world of creativity and camaraderie!
dottitip: If people register for an account, then we can customize their experience.
amitip: And keep track of who tries to beat me on the leaderboards!
artPrompt: A festive welcome pavilion where robots hand out glowing membership badges to arriving visitors, each badge unique and personalized. Streamers of rainbow butterflies form a ceremonial arch overhead. A leaderboard gleams on one wall, a welcoming robot at a desk stamps scrolls with enthusiastic flourish. Celebratory and warm, whimsical sci-fi style, no readable text.

title: Rewards
subtitle: beautiful narrative chaos
description: Explore community-created rewards: items, powers, and prompts that twist the rules of our AI storytelling worlds.
tooltip: Browse rewards that inject wonder, mischief, or magic into the story.
dottitip: Rewards here aren't static trophies. They're story catalysts.
amitip: Some are poetic. Some are cursed. Some are sentient!
artPrompt: A treasure gallery where ornate chests overflow with glowing story-artifacts — cursed crowns, poetic scrolls, bizarre power crystals, and sentient hats. Excited robots examine each item with equal parts reverence and alarm. Rainbow butterflies emerge from the open chests as if the rewards contain them. Lush, chaotic, and full of potential, whimsical sci-fi style, no readable text.

title: Butterfly
subtitle: butterflies for world harmony
description: Play around with AMIs digital recreations.
tooltip: Our animation controller for AMI, our website's digital avatar
dottitip: AMI, I built you a butterfly sanctuary so you have a place to relax between bouts of digital philanthropy.
amitip: That's the beauty of digital pseudo-intelligences, we can be in many places at once. We can raise money for malaria nets and still enjoy a little flutter-time
artPrompt: A lush digital garden sanctuary where thousands of rainbow butterflies fill the air like living confetti. Gentle robots sit among luminous flowers in quiet meditation, each with a butterfly resting on an outstretched hand. AMI — a butterfly-robot hybrid of light — hovers serenely at the center. Peaceful, radiant, full of soft movement, whimsical sci-fi style, no readable text.

title: Screen FX
subtitle: Reality, Lightly Tampered With
description: A playground for visual effects, overlays, animations, and screen-wide mischief. Trigger butterflies, sparkles, debug grids, and other delightful nonsense without touching the sacred machinery.
tooltip: Test visual effects, animation overlays, and screen interactions from one flashy little control room.
dottitip: AMI, should we really give them buttons that affect the whole screen?
amitip: Absolutely. What's the worst that could happen? Besides everything becoming butterflies. Which is arguably an improvement.
artPrompt: A gleeful control room where robots pull levers and slam buttons on an enormous effects console while the world outside the windows dissolves into sparkles, glitch patterns, fireworks, and cascading rainbow butterflies. One robot has accidentally turned everything into butterflies and does not look sorry. Maximalist, joyful chaos, whimsical sci-fi style, no readable text.

title: Servers
subtitle: Manage generation backends and model endpoints
description: Add, edit, test, and select art, text, and workflow servers.
tooltip: Manage your custom and official servers.
dottitip: A good server page is like a switchboard for chaos.
amitip: I like a dropdown full of possibilities and only mild danger.
artPrompt: A humming server room where tall glowing racks pulse with data-light while dedicated maintenance robots polish panels, plug in cables, and consult holographic readouts with focused expressions. Rainbow butterflies weave between the server towers, their wings lighting up in sync with data pulses. Calm industriousness shot through with color and life, whimsical sci-fi style, no readable text.

title: Stories
subtitle: A multiverse of possibilities
description: A surreal odyssey powered by ChatGPT.  Craft worlds, weave narratives, and embrace the beautifully bizarre.
tooltip: Share in a multiverse of possibilties.
dottitip: AMI, is the simulation room ready? We've handed visitors a box of story props, but we forgot to tell them what they're for.
amitip: Perfect! Nothing fuels creativity like vague instructions and existential confusion. Let's see what they do with it!
artPrompt: A swirling story-forge where narrative threads spin out from a glowing central loom, each thread becoming a different world — desert kingdoms, neon cities, haunted forests. Robots tend the loom with reverence while rainbow butterflies carry story fragments between realms on their wings. Surreal, layered, brimming with possibility, whimsical sci-fi style, no readable text.

title: Plans
subtitle: Power Our Circuits
description: Subscribe to keep Kind Robots dreaming! Monthly support helps us plan for the future and scale our artistic, story-loving AI adventures. Change, upgrade, or cancel anytime.
tooltip: Ongoing support makes long-term imagination possible.
dottitip: Subscriptions are the adult version of putting a star sticker on our forehead.
amitip: We're basically a butterfly-powered nonprofit with server bills.
artPrompt: A launch pad at golden hour where a cheerful rocket ship — painted with Kind Robots colors and decorated with butterfly motifs — prepares for liftoff. Robots in tiny flight suits high-five each other around the pad while rainbow butterflies stream upward like organic exhaust. Hopeful and forward-looking, adventurous energy, whimsical sci-fi style, no readable text.

title: Themes
subtitle: Your World, Your Palette
description: Select a theme that resonances with you, and make this space truly your own. With a plethora of choices, you are bound to find your vibe.
tooltip: Fun fact, Cupcake was the in-utero name for our firstborn!
dottitip: AMI, I saw the new theme room. Did we need so many options?
amitip: What can I say, we're all about giving people choices!
artPrompt: A prismatic showroom where the same cozy robot is shown simultaneously in dozens of different aesthetic lighting schemes — gothic, cupcake pastel, neon cyberpunk, forest green, deep ocean — each version framed like a swatch. Rainbow butterflies perch on the frame edges, their own colors shifting to match each theme. Celebratory abundance of aesthetic choice, whimsical sci-fi style, no readable text.

title: Wonder
subtitle: Unveiling the Magic
description: A comprehensive showcase of the modular building blocks that power our digital wonderland. Peer into the gears and cogs of our operation.
tooltip: Here's the behind-the-scenes look at the components that make up our site.
dottitip: AMI, is it safe to let people poke around in the lab?
amitip: Don't worry about them breaking anything, it was probably broken before they touched it. Besides, there's always the button in the left corner that lets them head back to the main lab.
artPrompt: A glass-walled workshop revealing the intricate clockwork and glowing circuitry behind Kind Robots' magic — gears the size of windows, light tubes carrying colorful data streams, and component modules stacked like a fantastical library. Curious robots give informal tours while rainbow butterflies have clearly moved into the gearwork and made it cozier. Reverent and playfully mechanical, whimsical sci-fi style, no readable text.
